About

Developer with a customer-first instinct.

I'm a Computer Science undergraduate at LAUTECH with a background that spans customer service and freelance WordPress development. That mix shapes how I build: I care as much about how a site feels to use as how clean the code is underneath.

My client work covers everything from campaign sites to small business builds — planning the structure, building it out in WordPress, and getting it live on real hosting. I like projects that sit at the intersection of design and function, where the goal isn't just "it works" but "it works well, for the person actually using it."
